betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Gas Centrifuge§f processes gaseous fluids for §bUranium Enrichment§f. Unlike standard centrifuges, it's optimized for hexafluoride cycles.

§eSetup:§f
• Set a §bFluid ID§f and pump in fluid via ducts/tanks/cells
• For UF6 enrichment: chain §b2-4 centrifuges§f in sequence
• §cOutput side faces AWAY§f from player when placed
• Last two centrifuges §crequire Overclocking upgrade§f

§eOperation:§f Uses §bprobability-based output§f (not 4 items per op like standard):
• §bUranium-238§f - Highest chance (~80%)
• §bUranium-235§f - Lower chance (~10%)
• §bFluorite§f - Lowest chance

§eTwo centrifuges in series§f yield §bU-238§f and §bUranium Fuel§f. §aThe sulfur in the processing line is not consumed.§f

§aTips:§f
• Check §bNEI§f for recipe probabilities
• Place ALL centrifuges before starting - recipe switching §cdumps internal tanks§f
• Machines must be §bdirectly adjacent§f for stage communication
